home.title: The arena where chance becomes divine.
heroQuotes: “Nuffle giveth, Nuffle taketh away. Especially on a double skull.”
“No plan survives the first roll of the dice.”
“There's no such thing as bad luck. Only a bored Nuffle.”
“Pray to Nuffle before the match. Curse him after.”
“The pitch never lies. The dice do.”
“Better one blitz in hand than two in the end zone.”
“The best defence is three Undead and a lot of optimism.”
“A touchdown is earned. A riot is improvised.”
“The ref saw nothing. The ref never sees anything.”
“Reroll your dice, not your conscience.”
“Everyone has a plan until they eat a POW.”
“Nuffle loves the bold. He buries the reckless.”
“One player down is one more for the afterlife.”
“Legends are made on the line of scrimmage. So are corpses.”
“Dodge, pray, repeat.”
“Chance is just another coach: unfair and in bad faith.”
“Keep the ball, keep the faith, keep your teeth.”
“On a 1, even Nuffle looks away.”
“The treasury empties, the infirmary fills — that's glory.”
“You don't lose at Blood Bowl. You learn to bleed.”
home.description: Free digital platform to create, manage, and live out your Blood Bowl teams. Build your rosters, recruit legendary Star Players, and track your tabletop matches.
home.subtitle: Compliant with the official Blood Bowl 2025 rules: 31 full rosters, 60+ Star Players, 130+ skills, budget and treasury management, PDF export for your games.
home.createFirstTeamDesc: Choose from 31 official rosters, recruit your players and Star Players, then export your team as a tabletop-ready PDF.

rosters.title: 31 official rosters
rosters.description: Every Season 3 team: Skaven, Elves, Orcs, Dwarves, Lizardmen, Gnomes, Imperial Nobility, and many more. Each roster follows the official rules and budgets.

starPlayers.title: 60+ Star Players
starPlayers.description: Recruit from 60+ legendary mercenaries — Griff Oberwald, Morg 'n' Thorg, Hakflem Skuttlespike — with full special rules and regional rules support.

exportPdf.title: Tabletop PDF export
exportPdf.description: Export your rosters as PDF with full information: players, Star Players, budget, treasury and statistics, ready for your in-person game.

skillsReference.title: Skills library
skillsReference.description: 130+ Blood Bowl skills, mutations and traits, fully detailed, searchable and categorised to help you plan moves and recruit smartly.

tutorial.title: Interactive tutorials
tutorial.description: Learn Nuffle Arena step by step with guided scenarios. Movement, blocking, passing, tackling, dodging: from beginner to advanced.

localMatches.title: Offline match entry
localMatches.description: Record and track your tabletop Blood Bowl matches: scores, injuries, SPP, treasury — and keep the full history of your team, offline.

cups.title: Cups & tournaments
cups.description: Create and manage your Blood Bowl cups: single-elimination tournaments, brackets, round-by-round results and honour rolls.

leagues.title: League management
leagues.description: Run a full season: divisions, automatic schedule, standings, promotions/relegations, bonus points and match sheets. Nuffle Arena's most complete feature, open to a handful of pilot leagues.

competitions.title: Take on the whole Old World
competitions.subtitle: From a one-night cup to a full season — lead your team to the top.

factions.title: 31 teams, one arena
factions.subtitle: From nimble Skaven to stubborn Dwarves — pick your side.

home.diceRollerHint: Defy Nuffle — official block die distribution
home.activityLine: Already {teams} teams forged and {matches} matches tracked by the community.
home.discoverTitle: Everything you need to play Blood Bowl
home.discoverSubtitle: A complete companion for coaches, from team building to tournament tracking.
home.latestNewsSubtitle: Articles, guides and behind-the-scenes from the Nuffle Arena blog.
home.faqA1: Yes. The site is 100% free, with no ads or paywall. You can support us via Ko-fi to help cover our server costs.
home.faqQ2: Is this an official Blood Bowl product?
home.faqA2: No. Nuffle Arena is a fan project, independent of Games Workshop. It follows the Blood Bowl 2025 (Season 3) rules for an authentic experience.
home.faqQ3: Can I use Nuffle Arena for my tabletop matches?
home.faqA3: Yes. Build your team, export it to PDF, and track your tabletop games with our tracker (scores, injuries, player progression, treasury).
home.faqA4: All 31 official Season 3 rosters: Skaven, Elves (Union, Wood, Dark, Pro Elves), Orcs, Black Orcs, Dwarves, Lizardmen, Gnomes, Halflings, Imperial Nobility, Chaos, Tomb Kings, Nurgle, Undead, Vampires, Amazons, Norse and more.

support.title: Support Nuffle Arena
support.subtitle: Nuffle Arena is a free and independent project, maintained by Blood Bowl enthusiasts. Your support helps us cover server costs and continue development.
support.kofiDescription: A one-time or recurring donation via Ko-fi. 0% commission on tips — 100% of your donation reaches us (minus bank fees).
support.linkCodeDescription: Paste this code in the "message" field of your Ko-fi donation so it is automatically linked to your account.
support.linkCodeAnonHint: Sign in to get a personal code so your donation is linked to your account.
support.whyFreedomDesc: No paywall, no pay-to-win advantage. The full game stays accessible to everyone, forever.
support.whyServersDesc: Hosting, database, domain name, SSL certificates — all of this has a monthly cost.
support.whyDevDesc: New features, bug fixes, new teams and game mechanics.
support.whyCommunityDesc: Organize tournaments, improve matchmaking and develop the mobile app.
support.transparencyDescription: We believe in full transparency. Here is how donations are used.
support.transparencyNote: Exact amounts will be published regularly once the first donations are received.
support.faqQ1: Does my donation give me an in-game advantage?
support.faqA1: No, never. Nuffle Arena will always be 100% free and fair. Donations are only used to cover costs and improve the site for everyone.
support.faqA2: It's your choice. Ko-fi allows one-time tips or recurring monthly support. You can cancel at any time.
support.faqA3: Ko-fi takes no commission on tips. Only standard bank fees apply (~2.9% + $0.30). We receive about 95% of your donation.
support.faqA4: Yes. Ko-fi allows you to make an anonymous donation if you wish.
support.faqA5: No. Nuffle Arena is not a registered charity. Donations are not tax-deductible.
support.thanksDescription: Every contribution, even the smallest, makes a difference. Thank you for keeping Nuffle Arena alive!
support.homeCtaDescription: This project is 100% free and maintained by passionate fans. A small contribution helps us keep the servers running!

feedback.title: Got feedback, a bug, or an idea?

feedback.messagePlaceholder: Please describe your feedback as precisely as possible. For a bug: what you were doing, what happened, and what you expected.
feedback.successMessage: Your message has been received. We will look into it as soon as possible.
feedback.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again in a moment.
feedback.errorCaptcha: Please complete the captcha before sending.
feedback.privacyNote: We do not store your IP address or any tracking cookies. Name and email are optional and only used to reply to you.
feedback.configMissing: This form is not configured (missing Turnstile key). Please contact the site admin.

about.title: The Nuffle Arena Pro League
about.intro: A permanent Blood Bowl-like league: 16 simulated teams, 15 matchdays, virtual betting, daily Gazette and a Hall of Fame. Every Tuesday at 9 PM CET, Nuffle decides the fate of the Old World's greatest legends.
about.howItWorksStep1Body: The sim engine plays each match using a seed and a frozen version (`engineVer`). No hidden randomness — everything is replayable bit-for-bit.
about.howItWorksStep2Body: At kickoff, the broadcaster dispatches pre-simulated events in real time. Low latency, reconnect-friendly via Last-Event-ID.
about.howItWorksStep3Body: Odds come from pre-simulation (N=200 runs). The odd at bet placement (`oddsAtPlace`) is locked for fairness. Automatic post-match settlement.
about.howItWorksStep4Body: Every morning at 8 AM, Claude Haiku writes the day's edition from the factual recap: 1 main article + briefs + signed editorial.
about.featureLiveBody: 8 matches simulated in parallel each Tuesday night, streamed live via SSE with Pixi rendering and a mobile-friendly text ticker.
about.featureBetsBody: 6+ markets per match (Moneyline, Total TDs, MVP, Casualties, Nuffle, Double chance). Dynamic odds. Winnings credited automatically post-match.
about.featureGazetteBody: Articles written by AI every morning at 8 AM: 1 main article + briefs + editorial signed by 1 of 3 personas (the cynic, the orc enthusiast, the statistician).
about.featureHofBody: Frozen snapshot of immortalised players (death in match, career achievements) — name, race, stats, induction reason remain accessible forever.
about.scheduleTuesdayBody: Matchday kickoff — 8 matches simulated in parallel, live SSE broadcast.
about.scheduleDailyBody: Day's Nuffle Gazette: main article + briefs + editorial.
about.scheduleResetBody: Daily Crowns login bonus + first season visit = welcome bonus.
about.scheduleSeasonBody: Classic round-robin. Season aligned with the NFL 2026-27 calendar.
about.faqA1: A Blood Bowl-like league of 16 simulated teams (NFL × BB race tributes). Matches are played automatically by a deterministic engine; fans follow, bet and read the daily Gazette.
about.faqA2: No mandatory action. You can follow passively, open a free account to bet in virtual Crowns, or follow a team to receive a personalised newsfeed.
about.faqA3: No. Crowns are a 100% virtual currency, credited at signup and earned through daily bonuses. No cashout, no link to real currency, no in-app purchases.
about.faqA4: Classic round-robin: 16 teams × 15 matchdays = 120 matches per season, 8 matches per matchday. Calibrated to align with the NFL season (September → January).
about.faqQ5: How does the engine guarantee fair play?
about.faqA5: All matches use the same versioned deterministic engine (engineVer frozen on each match). Replays are stored in CBOR + gzip and replayable bit-for-bit. Odds are locked at the time of the bet (`oddsAtPlace`) — no retroactive re-pricing.
about.faqQ6: What happens when a player dies in a match?
about.faqA6: Casualty 'dead' → player removed from the roster, automatic entry to the Hall of Fame, procedurally generated rookie to fill the gap. A realistic cycle that mimics Blood Bowl attrition.
about.faqQ7: Is the Gazette written by a human?
about.faqA7: No — Claude Haiku writes each edition from the previous day's factual recap. The tone is pulp Blood Bowl-like, signed by 1 of 3 personas. Everything is anchored on real match data.
about.faqQ8: Can I rewatch a past match?
about.faqA8: Yes. Every completed match has a replay player with play/pause, scrub bar, 0.5×–8× speed, markers on key moments (TD/casualty/Nuffle), and keyboard shortcuts.
about.disclaimerBody: Crowns are a virtual in-game currency. No cashout, no in-app purchase, no link to real currency. Nuffle Arena is not a sports betting platform in any legal sense — it's a fantasy game where strategy, predictions and pulp humour replace money. Participation is free and without obligation.
